packageRules.description: Wait 3 days before automerging major updates
Group GitHub Actions into one PR
Group docker-compose images into one PR
Keep @types/node major aligned with Node engine (.nvmrc pins 24)
Group pnpm pins in package.json (npm manager) and .mise.toml (mise manager) into one PR to avoid drift

Throttle the local Renovate CLI pin (RENOVATE_VERSION in the Makefile, custom.regex manager — the npm manager's minimumReleaseAge does not apply to it). Renovate publishes to npm several times a day; without a delay this dev-only tool spams a near-daily PR. 7 days keeps it roughly weekly.

Group the Node major across the mise pin (.mise.toml) and the Dockerfile `node` base image so a major bump (e.g. 24->25) moves as ONE PR rather than splitting across managers. `make check-node-alignment` (first prereq of static-check) is the deterministic backstop. Note: the distroless runtime image (gcr.io/distroless/nodejs<major>) carries the major in its image NAME, not a tag, so it is not depName 'node' and cannot be grouped here — the alignment guard is what catches it. .nvmrc is not Renovate-managed (no 'nvm' in enabledManagers), so it is bumped manually and guarded by the same check.

Disable digest pinning for Makefile-tracked docker dev tools (mermaid-cli). The custom.regex manager captures version only, not digest; docker:pinDigests would otherwise generate a phantom pin-digest update Renovate cannot write back (visible on the Dependency Dashboard as the persistently-errored 'Pin minlag/mermaid-cli Docker tag to <hash>'). Scoped by file + datasource (NOT matchManagers): Renovate may surface the custom.regex manager as 'regex', which would silently void a matchManagers:['custom.regex'] AND-combined rule; matchFileNames=Makefile + matchDatasources=docker is the robust, unambiguous scope (the Makefile is the only docker-datasource source outside the Dockerfile). Production-runtime docker pins in Dockerfile/compose/workflow services keep their digest pins via the same preset; only this Makefile docker scope is exempted.

customManagers.description: Update Makefile tool versions via inline renovate comments. The extractVersion group is required so that annotations like `extractVersion=^v(?<version>.*)$` (used on ZAP_VERSION) do not silently drop the constant — without the group, the regex cannot traverse past the extractVersion token and the dep extracts zero entries.
Update GitHub Actions workflow env vars via inline renovate comments (e.g. ZAP_VERSION)

Update docker image digests in GitHub Actions services blocks. The currentDigest group MUST include the 'sha256:' prefix because Renovate's docker datasource emits newDigest with the prefix — capturing only the hex chars produced phantom 'currentDigest=<hex>' vs 'newDigest=sha256:<hex>' diffs that Renovate kept retrying as failed digest updates.
